raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Gallagher and Dahle requested $21.5 million to rebuild Paradise Elementary School, which was destroyed in the fire.",
    "Rebuilding Paradise Elementary School is a key part of the community’s recovery.",
    "The $21.5 million requested by Gallagher and Dahle is needed to complete construction and keep up with growing enrollment.",
    "PUSD recently sought assistance to avoid being penalized by the state for being unable to meet school staffing requirements.",
    "Gallagher and Dahle submitted a formal budget request to extend PUSD’s staffing ratio waiver by at least 7 years.",
    "Without the waiver extension, PUSD may face more than $150,000 in state penalties annually.",
    "High levels of trauma and enrollment growth are requiring PUSD to add administrators as students and classes increase."
  ]
}
```
